resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def subtractProductAndSum(self, n: int) -> int:
        product = 1
        total_sum = 0
        while n > 0:
            digit = n % 10
            product *= digit
            total_sum += digit
            n //= 10
        return product - total_sum
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through each digit of the input number, calculating the product and sum of its digits. It achieves this in a single pass, resulting in a time complexity of O(log n) due to the number of digits in n. The space complexity is O(1) as it uses a constant amount of space.
